name: Hazard Warning Tape
shortDescription: Black-and-yellow hazard warning tape for temporary hazard and barrier marking.
longDescription: Black-and-yellow diagonal-striped tape for cordoning off temporary hazards, excavation edges and restricted areas — the fastest, lowest-cost way to mark a hazard the moment it's identified, ahead of permanent signage or barriers going up.

images.alt: Hazard Warning Tape supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
